## Meeting Purpose

[Catch up on business updates and prepare for upcoming panel discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) raised $12M Series A, hit $5M ARR with 34 customers and 61 deals in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [G's company (growth.li/hyper growth) focusing on upmarket strategy, targeting $250k+ deals](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Discussed potential collaboration/acquisition, but G prefers current business model](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [Preparing for joint panel discussion on AI in marketing/sales next week](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

## Topics

### Business Updates: fwd.digital

  - [Raised $12M Series A at favorable terms/valuation](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Hit $5M ARR with 34 customers](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [61 deals in pipeline, 24 contracts out for signature](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Average deal size: $157k](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Hiring 25 people this year](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Building advanced workflow-as-code platform for AI-powered content/marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)

### Business Updates: growth.li (Hyper Growth)

  - [Not fundraising, focusing on organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Targeting upmarket clients: $250k+ deal sizes, $15M+ companies](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Current challenges: founder involvement in sales, equity-based model limits scalability](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Aiming to grow from \~$6-7M to $12-14M annual revenue](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Considering more involved customer success for larger deals](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)

### fwd.digital Product Vision

  - [Building workflow-as-code platform for complex knowledge tasks](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Integrates coding agents, runtime layer, and expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
  - [Enables rapid workflow creation and adaptation](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Scalable infrastructure for thousands of parallel processes](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [Applicable to various job functions beyond content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)

### RAMP Project Update

  - [Content production improved: stable, fast, high-quality](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [AI enablement workshops underperformed due to time investment required](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Traffic and SQL results not meeting expectations despite content improvements](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

### Panel Discussion Preparation

  - [Topic: Challenges and opportunities in AI for marketing/sales](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Target audience: 15-20 CMOs from large companies](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Key points to discuss:](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
    1.  Current state of AI in marketing/sales
    2.  Limitations of fully autonomous AI agents
    3.  Effectiveness of hybrid human-AI approaches
    4.  Unexpected outcomes and learnings from AI implementations
    5.  AI's impact on roles like PMM and sales enablement

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to discuss fwd.digital's current product in-depth](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Finalize details of G's potential angel investment in fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Both to prepare bullet points and examples for panel discussion](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Marcel to investigate RAMP project's traffic/SQL performance issues](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Create shared Notion page with agreed talking points for panel](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Consider reusing content for G's upcoming SaaStr talk in May](https://fathom.video/share/fiTzuRxEZncF6KRKY97C-exeNmqGbP5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
